question: How much RAM did I upgrade my laptop to?

retrieval_results.context:
User upgraded desktop monitor to a 24-inch 4K LG, enjoys improvement over old 1080p monitor, and seeks tips to get the most out of the new monitor.
User has a Dell Inspiron 15 5000 series laptop from 2018, uses it as primary work laptop, upgraded RAM to 16GB, now experiencing battery life drop from 6-7 to 4-5 hours, and plans to calibrate the battery.
User is considering upgrading desktop graphics card, researching affordable alternatives to NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070 (~$500), and wants recommendations.
User owns a 1TB Western Digital portable external hard drive purchased from Best Buy for approximately $50, uses it regularly for backups, and feels peace of mind knowing files are safe.
